keyPoints: Multi-component interventions (inoculation + accuracy nudges) with booster reinforcement
Tailor interventions to cognitive-ability profiles and prior skepticism among habitual AI users
Emphasize layered defenses: inoculation, accuracy nudges, and debunking working in tandem
Test effectiveness across AI-related domains (AI-generated text, deepfakes, AI-curated feeds) and multilingual contexts
Include standardized effect sizes, preregistration, and moderator analyses for cognitive ability, skepticism, and task difficulty
